channel.title: De Boys Seh on The Guyana Brief
channel.description: Recent content in De Boys Seh on The Guyana Brief

item.title: De Boys Seh — April 9, 2026
item.description: Speedeet and Wilar from Pike Street have thoughts about the cash grant, the street lights, the police recruits, and why 101 is a suspicious number.

item.title: De Boys Seh — April 6, 2026
item.description: Speedeet and Wilar debate Easter kite regulations, whether CARIFTA medals count as homework excuses, and the ongoing philosophy of the $100,000 cash grant.

item.title: De Boys Seh – Thursday, April 2, 2026
item.description: De boys had a lot to say this Thursday. Tint meters, missing Nicaraguans, Venezuelan jails, and Exxon getting compared to Judas. Again.

item.title: De Boys Seh: Whose Streets Are These Exactly?
item.description: De boys at de corner discuss de government taking over Georgetown streets, de flooding, why de powerships still here, and Rihanna makeup landing in Guyana.

item.title: De Boys Seh: We Want To Know About De Wheelbarrow
item.description: Speedeet and Wilar have questions about the week's news. Mostly about the wheelbarrow.

item.title: De Boys Seh — March 19, 2026
item.description: What de boys on the fictional corner saying this week. All names fictional. All scenarios fictional.

item.title: De Boys Seh: Training College, Carnival, and Why Cricket Better Than School
item.description:
De Boys Seh is Speedeet and Wilar’s weekly kid commentary on the news. They’re 12. Their opinions are their own. No politics.

Speedeet: “So they build a big big training college in Berbice. Like, HUGE. To train people fuh work on de oil rigs.”

Wilar: “How big?”

Speedeet: “Twenty BILLION dollars big.”

Wilar: “…Dat is more than my school spend on we in my entire life.”

Speedeet: “Dat is more than EVERY school spend on EVERY student in de history of schools.”

item.title: De Boys Seh: Exxon Collecting Ships Like Sticker Book
item.description: De boys at the rum shop react to Exxon owning all four FPSOs, Dr. Singh's Pablo Escobar moment, and the budget debate that was better than any movie.

item.title: De Boys Seh: Development Bank Loans, Mash Prep, and Why Big People Love de Word 'Ambitious'
item.description: Speedeet and Wilar try to understand interest-free loans, wonder who is paying for Mash costumes, and discover that big people use de word ‘ambitious’ for everything.

item.title: De Boys Seh: Oil Talk, Border Soldiers, and Birthday Party Entry Fees
item.description: Speedeet and Wilar from Pike Street, Kitty try to understand oil contracts, wonder why soldiers watching de border, and complain about paying to attend birthday parties.

item.title: De Boys Seh: Hotels, Digital Records, and Why Adults Confusing
item.description: Speedeet and Wilar from Pike Street, Kitty break down fancy hotels, digital health records, and why de women cricket team is de real MVP.

item.title: De Boys Seh: Wha Speedeet & Wilar Talking About Dis Week
item.description: Speedeet and Wilar share dem thoughts on cricket, video games, school lunch, and why adults always saying ‘back in me days.’ Short takes from two 12-year-olds!
